Title: Verify successful user registration with valid credentials
Preconditions: System is running; no user with provided email exists.
Test Steps:
1. Call `Utente()` constructor with provided data.
2. Verify `setPassword("SecurePass123!")` succeeds.
3. Verify `setNome("John")` and `setCognome("Doe")` succeed.
4. Attempt to retrieve `getNome()` and `getCognome()`.
Expected Result:
- User object created with correct attributes.
- No errors during setters/getters.
- `getid()` returns a valid auto-generated integer.

Title: Validate password update with invalid format
Test Data: - Invalid password: `weak` (no special char, too short)
Test Steps:
1. Call `setPassword("weak")` on existing user.
2. Attempt to retrieve `getid()` (to confirm object integrity).
Expected Result:
- `setPassword()` rejects input (throws exception or returns `false`).
- User object remains unchanged (ID, email, etc. preserved).

Title: Test user name update with empty string
Expected Result:
- `setNome()` rejects input (throws exception or returns `false`).
- `getNome()` still returns `"John"`.

Title: Create product with valid attributes and assign ownership
Test Data:
- Nome: `Vintage Chair`
- Luogo: `Milan, Italy`
- Descrizione: `Solid oak, 1950s design`
- Immagine: `chair.jpg`
- Prezzo: `199.99`
- Proprietario: `user1`
Test Steps:
1. Create `Prodotto` object with provided data.
2. Call `setProprietario(user1)`.
3. Verify `getProprietario()` returns `user1`.
4. Verify all getters return correct values.
Expected Result:
- Product object created with all attributes set.
- Ownership link (`Proprietario`) correctly established.

Title: Update product price with negative value
Expected Result:
- `setPrezzo()` rejects input (throws exception or returns `false`).
- `getPrezzo()` still returns `199.99`.

Title: Verify product ownership transfer
Test Steps:
1. Call `setProprietario(user2)` on `P1`.
2. Verify `getProprietario()` returns `user2`.
3. Verify `user1` no longer has `P1` in their owned products (if tracked externally).
Expected Result:
- Ownership successfully transferred.
- No data corruption in related user/product associations.

Title: Create valid report targeting another user
Test Data:
- Tipo: `true` (e.g., "violation")
- Titolo: `Suspicious Activity`
- Descrizione: `User2 posted fake products repeatedly`
- UtenteSegnalato: `user2`
- Autore: `user1`
Test Steps:
1. Create `Segnalazione` object with provided data.
2. Verify `getAutore()` returns `user1`.
3. Verify `getUtenteSegnalato()` returns `user2`.
4. Verify `getTipo()` returns `true`.
Expected Result:
- Report object created with all attributes set.
- Relationships (`Autore`/`UtenteSegnalato`) correctly linked.

Title: Attempt to create report with empty title
Test Steps:
1. Call `setTitolo("")` during `Segnalazione` creation.
2. Attempt to call `getTitolo()`.
Expected Result:
- `setTitolo()` rejects input (throws exception or returns `false`).
- Report object remains incomplete (no title stored).

Title: Verify report author cannot target themselves
Expected Result:
- System rejects the report (throws exception or returns `false`).
- No report object created with self-targeting.

Title: End-to-end: User reports another user’s product
Test Steps:
1. `user2` creates a `Segnalazione` with:
   - `Autore=user2`
   - `UtenteSegnalato=user1`
   - `Titolo="Fake Product"`
   - `Descrizione="P1 is a replica"`
2. Verify `user1` is linked as `UtenteSegnalato` in the report.
3. Verify `P1` is not automatically removed (business rule not specified; assume no auto-deletion).
Expected Result:
- Report successfully created and linked to `user1`.
- No side effects on `P1` or `user1`'s other products.

Title: Edge case: Report with maximum description length
Test Data: - Descrizione: A string of 5000 characters (assuming no explicit limit, test boundary).
Test Steps:
1. Create `Segnalazione` with `Descrizione` set to 5000-character string.
2. Call `getDescrizione()`.
Expected Result:
- System accepts input (no truncation or error).
- Full description retrievable via getter.

Title: Verify product deletion cascades ownership removal
Preconditions:
- Product `P1` owned by `user1`.
- `P1` has no reports or dependencies.
Test Steps:
1. Delete `P1` (simulated via external system call).
2. Verify `user1` no longer has `P1` in their owned products list.
3. Verify no `Segnalazione` objects reference `P1` (if applicable).
Expected Result:
- Ownership link removed from `user1`.
- No orphaned references in `Segnalazione` (if `Prodotto` is not directly referenced in reports).
